name: even the simplest site design is delivered fully cited
command:
printf %s '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"cost-reduction","availability_tolerance":"days","data_loss_tolerance":"hours","budget_posture":"cost-first","data_volume":"small","read_write_pattern":"read-heavy","data_cadence":"batch","workload":"a newsletter and event signup page for my community group","criticality":"experimental","data_sensitivity":"internal","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"small","consistency_need":"eventual","communication_style":"synchronous","integration_scope":"internal-only"}}' > p.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "community newsletter site" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(File.read("s/technical-requirements.json")); f=d["pillars"].values.flatten.map{|c| c["concern"]}; ng=(d["needs_grounding"]||[]).size; pk=d["pillars"].keys; abort unless ng==0 && d["concerns_total"].to_i>0' && echo content-site-still-cited 1>&2
